title: Insecure TLS Cipher Negotiation (Policy Violation)
description: Internal monitoring detected that the service 'HR-Portal-Dev' is negotiating TLS 1.0/1.1 connections with a legacy middleware agent. Organizational policy requires TLS 1.2+ for all internal services. This is a non-critical compliance finding in a non-production environment.

timeline.event: Periodic compliance scan initiated by Qualys agent
Alert generated: Insecure TLS 1.1 handshake detected
